<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M12 0L14.6 9.4L24 12L14.6 14.6L12 24L9.4 14.6L0 12L9.4 9.4L12 0Z" fill="#F59E0B"/></svg>
Twenty-four speakers. Zero keynote fluff. These are the first eight — the rest land with the schedule.
“The edge is a lie (a useful one)”
Our call for proposals is open until July 1. First-time speakers get a free coaching session with a past speaker.

meta_description: The first eight speakers of Commit '26.
name: commit_speakers
